articles.title: Celtics start fast again and roll to 133-101 blowout of the Bucks
articles.description:
Jayson Tatum was an assist shy of his second straight triple-double despite sitting out the entire fourth quarter.

The post Celtics start fast again and roll to 133-101 blowout of the Bucks appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics defeated the Bucks 133-101 on April 3, showcasing strong team performance.
Jayson Tatum nearly achieved a triple-double, finishing with 28 points and 9 assists.
This victory boosts Celtics' momentum as they approach the playoffs, energizing local fans.
